name: Dead Code
description: The product contains code that can never be executed because surrounding code makes it unreachable. Dead code increases maintenance burden and may indicate logic errors or incomplete refactoring.
detection_pattern: STRUCTURAL node contains code paths that are unreachable due to CONTROL nodes with conditions that always prevent execution (e.g., following a return statement or within an always-false branch). No INGRESS or data flow can trigger the dead code path.
